## Inline Links

Here is [a link to example](https://example.com) in text.

Here is [a link with title](https://example.com "Example Title") with a title.

## Reference Links

Here is [a reference link][ref1] in text.

And [another reference][ref2] link.

[ref1]: https://example.com "Reference 1"
[ref2]: https://example.com/other

## Autolinks

Visit <https://example.com> for more info.

Email: <user@example.com>

## Images

Here is an image:

![Alt text for image](https://example.com/image.png)

![Image with title](https://example.com/image.png "Image Title")

## Bare URLs

Just a URL in text: https://example.com/bare
